signals.title: State Triathlon Championship
signals.reason: The flat, stroller-friendly paths around the Rowing Base are perfect for a family stroll, and watching the athletes swim and bike adds exciting, dynamic visual fun for a 4-year-old.
signals.note: No evidence of a 'State Triathlon Championship' taking place in Plovdiv on these dates.

signals.title: Light Up the Neighborhood – Theatre in the Park
signals.location: Various green parks in Plovdiv neighborhoods
signals.reason: This festival brings free, open-air, accessible theatre performances directly into neighborhood parks, making it easy to enjoy without the formality of a theatre building.
signals.note: Plovdiv regularly hosts outdoor cultural initiatives in July, making this plausible and family-relevant.

signals.title: Regional Natural History Museum Visit
signals.reason: Directly loved by your daughter; this local gem features an aquarium, a terrarium, a digital planetarium, and highly engaging exhibits for early-years exploration.
signals.note: Verified as a real, operational, and highly recommended family-friendly museum in Plovdiv.

signals.title: Children's Railway 'Banner of Peace'
signals.reason: An absolute favorite for 4-year-olds: a real miniature train taking a safe, scenic loop complete with a dark tunnel and drawbridges.
signals.note: Verified as a popular, operational children's railway located on Youth Hill in Plovdiv.

signals.title: Aviation Museum Krumovo
signals.reason: Spacious, safe, open-air grounds with dozens of massive airplanes and helicopters where your toddler can run freely on the grass while marveling at the big machines.
signals.note: Verified as an operational open-air museum in Krumovo, safely within the travel radius and great for toddlers.

signals.title: Ayazmoto Park & Hall of Laughter
signals.location: Stara Zagora (~75 min drive from Plovdiv)
signals.reason: A massive, shady park with wide paths and a 'Hall of Laughter' filled with curved sensory mirrors. It pairs perfectly with a repeat trip to your beloved Stara Zagora Zoo nearby.
signals.note: Verified as a major park in Stara Zagora within the 90-minute travel radius, featuring family-friendly attractions.
